user.title: Configure Pstryk Energy
user.description: Enter your API token from the Pstryk panel (https://app.pstryk.pl).

data_description.api_token: Authorization token from Pstryk panel (format: sk-...)
data_description.is_prosumer: Check if you have a solar installation and feed energy to the grid
data_description.enable_panel: Show a dedicated Pstryk Energy panel in the Home Assistant sidebar
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch data (default: every 15 minutes)
data_description.blebox_ip: Local IP address of the BleBox smart meter (optional, e.g. 192.168.0.48)

error.blebox_cannot_connect: Cannot connect to BleBox meter at the given IP address
